THE HEIST

INT. BANK LOBBY - DAY

The bank is busy with customers. Security guards watch the doors.

MAX (30s, confident) enters, wearing a suit and carrying a briefcase.

MAX
(to the teller)
I'd like to access my safety deposit box, please.

TELLER (40s, professional)
Of course, sir. Right this way.

INT. SAFETY DEPOSIT VAULT - CONTINUOUS

MAX opens his box. Inside: a keycard and a USB drive.

MAX
(smiling)
Perfect.

INT. UNDERGROUND PARKING GARAGE - NIGHT

MAX approaches a black van. The side door slides open.

LENA (30s, intense) is inside, surrounded by monitors.

LENA
Did you get it?

MAX
(climbing in)
Both pieces. We're go for tomorrow.

INT. MUSEUM CORRIDOR - DAY

MAX and LENA, now dressed as security technicians, walk past priceless art.

LENA
(whispering)
Cameras are on a 90-second loop.

MAX
Plenty of time.

INT. MUSEUM SECURITY ROOM - DAY

GUARD (50s, bored) watches monitors. He yawns.

On screen: the corridor is empty. Then, static.

GUARD
(sitting up)
What the—

INT. MUSEUM VAULT - DAY

MAX works on a digital keypad. LENA keeps watch.

MAX
Three... two... one...

The vault door clicks open. Inside: the Crown Jewel.

LENA
(awed)
It's beautiful.

MAX
Grab it. We've got 60 seconds.

INT. MUSEUM ROOFTOP - NIGHT

MAX and LENA run across the roof. Helicopter blades chop the air.

LENA
(shouting)
Go! Go! Go!

They leap onto the helicopter's skids as it lifts off.

EXT. CITY STREETS - DAWN

The helicopter flies low between buildings. Police cars swarm below.

MAX
(into radio)
Extraction team, we're incoming. Package secure.

VOICE (V.O.)
Copy. LZ is hot. Good luck.

INT. WAREHOUSE - DAWN

MAX and LENA climb out of the helicopter inside a massive warehouse.

A figure emerges from the shadows: MR. BLACK (60s, commanding).

MR. BLACK
(slow clap)
Impressive work. Both of you.

MAX
(holding out the jewel)
The Crown Jewel, as promised.

MR. BLACK
(taking it)
No, Max. That's a replica.

LENA
(pulling a gun)
Which means the real one is still in the museum.

MAX
(shocked)
Lena?

LENA
I work for the insurance company.

MR. BLACK
(smiling)
And I work for the museum.

MAX
(realizing)
This was all a setup.

EXT. WAREHOUSE - DAWN

Police SWARM the building from all sides. Red and blue lights flash.

MAX is led away in handcuffs.

MAX
(to Lena)
I should've known.

LENA
(watching him go)
Yeah. You should have.

FADE TO BLACK.
